name: Flowborn (Tank)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Vitality: Increases max Health and Physical and Magical Defense.
Piercing Heart: Increases max Health and Physical Attack.
Haste: Increases max Health and Movement Speed.
Focus: Increases max Health and Cooldown Reduction.
Spend 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack and deal damage and gain recovery.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Power From Within
skills.description:
Charges at the target and slashes, dealing damage, launching enemies, and gaining a shield.
Using the skill continuously over a short time converts it to Clearing Slash and Rifting Slash.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 4 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after use.

skills.name: All In
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and attacks, dealing damage and launching enemies.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after this use.

tips: Flowborn (Tank) is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.5% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Meteor → Boots of Tranquility → Axe of Torment → Nettle Gauntlet → Frostscar's Embrace → Longnight Guardian.
Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Tank)'s Tank kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Convergence → Power From Within → All In → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Flowborn (Tank) excels into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.

Flowborn (Tank) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Tank). Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Tank) good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) is Tier A Tank with 48.5% win rate, 1.0% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Tank) build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Meteor, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Nettle Gauntlet, Frostscar's Embrace, Longnight Guardian. Run Fate, Penetration arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Tank)?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying into Flowborn (Tank). Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Flowborn (Tank) completes core items. Flowborn (Tank) struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Flowborn (Tank) counter?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) is strong into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Flowborn (Tank) when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Tank) good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Tank). Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Flowborn (Tank) play?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Tank, Fighter). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Flowborn (Tank)?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate, Penetration arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Flowborn (Tank) or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 2.9% more often globally. Choose Flowborn (Tank) when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Flowborn (Tank)?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.2%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
